name: Chantilly Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter a shallow 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
3. Spread the mashed potatoes evenly in the prepared dish.
4. Whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold in the grated Swiss cheese, then add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Spread the cheese mixture over the potatoes.
7. Bake for 25 - 30 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
